message:
fix(runtime): enforce cancel attribution bounds in region cascading (bd-3u25s)

Replace unbounded with_cause() calls with with_cause_limited() at both
cancellation propagation points in RuntimeState, ensuring cause chains
respect CancelAttributionConfig depth and memory limits. Add 6 stress
and edge-case tests covering deep chains, wide fanout, zero-config
boundaries, and incremental growth matching the runtime pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
